introSection: U-shaped Roller Coaster is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster located at Victory Kingdom in Wuqing, Tianjin, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster has a track layout consisting of two vertical spikes separated by a straight section of track. The train is launched forwards, up one spike and backwards up the other.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: In each car, each row sits back-to-back.

fullText:
U-shaped Roller Coaster is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster located at Victory Kingdom in Wuqing, Tianjin, China.

This roller coaster has a track layout consisting of two vertical spikes separated by a straight section of track. The train is launched forwards, up one spike and backwards up the other.

In each car, each row sits back-to-back.
